_comment: Atlas Vector Search index definition. Create this ONCE in the Atlas UI (Atlas Search -> Create Search Index -> JSON Editor) on database `peoples_priorities`, collection `issueclusters`. Index name must match ATLAS_VECTOR_INDEX in .env (default: cluster_vector_index). IMPORTANT: numDimensions must match your embedding model: 1536 for OpenAI text-embedding-3-small, 1024 for NVIDIA nvidia/nv-embedqa-e5-v5. Update the value below to match OPENAI_EMBEDDING_MODEL.
